items.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
items.summary: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

items.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
items.summary: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."

items.title: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
items.summary: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.
